languages.text:
Each time the Overseer should be affected by the Perils of the Warp, they affect a random enemy inside the area of the {g|f:3159a138a7ee4cc48f4c88ebd3399d96}Relaying{/g} Psyber-Raven instead. If no enemies are present, the Perils of the Warp will affect the Overseer as usual.
The Overseer must be inside that area to make this effect active.

traits.locale_text:
Each time the Overseer should be affected by the Perils of the Warp, they affect a random enemy inside the area of the {g|f:3159a138a7ee4cc48f4c88ebd3399d96}Relaying{/g} Psyber-Raven instead. If no enemies are present, the Perils of the Warp will affect the Overseer as usual.
The Overseer must be inside that area to make this effect active.

languages.text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. Exceptionally powerful enemies can be immune to instant-kill effects. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.
languages.original_text: Если {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}надзиратель{/g} в радиусе 4 клеток от псайберворона вызвал {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}угрозы варпа{/g}, они действуют не на надзирателя, а на случайного врага в этой же области. У некоторых особо сильных врагов есть иммунитет к эффектам, которые могут немедленно их убить. Если в этой области врагов нет, то угрозы варпа действуют на надзирателя, как обычно.

traits.locale_text: If the Overseer is in the {g|f:3159a138a7ee4cc48f4c88ebd3399d96}relaying{/g} psyber-raven's area of effect, whenever they trigger the perils of the warp, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. If there are no enemies in the area, the perils of the warp affect the Overseer as usual.

If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. Exceptionally powerful enemies can be immune to instant-kill effects. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.

If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. Exceptionally powerful enemies can be immune to instant-kill effects. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.

If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}, ruhsiber kuzgunun etrafındaki 4 hücrelik yarıçap içindeyse {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}öteboyut tehlikelerini{/g} her tetiklediğinde öteboyut tehlikeleri, Gözetmen yerine o alandaki rastgele bir düşmanı etkiler. Aşırı güçlü düşmanlar, anında öldüren etkilere karşı bağışık olabilir. Alanda hiç düşman yoksa öteboyut tehlikeleri, her zamanki gibi Gözetmen'i etkiler.
languages.original_text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. Exceptionally powerful enemies can be immune to instant-kill effects. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.

traits.locale_text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}, ruhsiber kuzgunun etrafındaki 4 hücrelik yarıçap içindeyse {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}öteboyut tehlikelerini{/g} her tetiklediğinde öteboyut tehlikeleri, Gözetmen yerine o alandaki rastgele bir düşmanı etkiler. Aşırı güçlü düşmanlar, anında öldüren etkilere karşı bağışık olabilir. Alanda hiç düşman yoksa öteboyut tehlikeleri, her zamanki gibi Gözetmen'i etkiler.

{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}, ruhsiber kuzgunun etrafındaki 4 hücrelik yarıçap içindeyse öteboyut tehlikelerini her tetiklediğinde öteboyut tehlikeleri, Gözetmen yerine o alandaki rastgele bir düşmanı etkiler. Alanda hiç düşman yoksa öteboyut tehlikeleri, her zamanki gibi Gözetmen'i etkiler.

languages.text: Si el {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g} está a 4 casillas o menos de distancia del psicocuervo, cada vez que el supervisor provoque {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}fatalidades de la disformidad{/g}, afectará a un enemigo aleatorio que esté dentro de esa zona en vez de al supervisor. Los enemigos especialmente poderosos pueden ser inmunes a los efectos de muerte instantánea. Si no hay enemigos en esta zona, las fatalidades de la disformidad afectan al supervisor de la manera habitual.
languages.original_text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. Exceptionally powerful enemies can be immune to instant-kill effects. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.

traits.locale_text: Si el {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g} está a 4 casillas o menos de distancia del psicocuervo, cada vez que el supervisor provoque {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}fatalidades de la disformidad{/g}, afectará a un enemigo aleatorio que esté dentro de esa zona en vez de al supervisor. Los enemigos especialmente poderosos pueden ser inmunes a los efectos de muerte instantánea. Si no hay enemigos en esta zona, las fatalidades de la disformidad afectan al supervisor de la manera habitual.

languages.text: 如果{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}与生化渡鸦之间的距离不超过4格，则每当监察官触发{g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}亚空间的威胁{/g}时，该效果不再会影响监察官，而会影响距离4格内的随机一名敌人。极为强大的敌人会无视秒杀效果。如果此区域内没有任何敌人，则亚空间的威胁效果依然会作用于监察官。
languages.original_text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. Exceptionally powerful enemies can be immune to instant-kill effects. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.

traits.locale_text: 如果{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}与生化渡鸦之间的距离不超过4格，则每当监察官触发{g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}亚空间的威胁{/g}时，该效果不再会影响监察官，而会影响距离4格内的随机一名敌人。极为强大的敌人会无视秒杀效果。如果此区域内没有任何敌人，则亚空间的威胁效果依然会作用于监察官。

languages.text: Wenn sich der {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Aufseher{/g} in einem Radius von 4 Feldern um den Pstitech-Rabe befindet und {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}Gefahren des Warp{/g} aktiviert, wird anstelle des Aufsehers ein zufälliger Gegner im Wirkungsbereich beeinflusst. Außerordentlich mächtige Gegner können gegen Sofortkill-Effekte immun sein. Halten sich in diesem Bereich keine Gegner auf, wirkt sich "Gefahren des Warp" wie gewohnt auf den Aufseher aus.
languages.original_text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. Exceptionally powerful enemies can be immune to instant-kill effects. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.

traits.locale_text: Wenn sich der {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Aufseher{/g} in einem Radius von 4 Feldern um den Pstitech-Rabe befindet und {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}Gefahren des Warp{/g} aktiviert, wird anstelle des Aufsehers ein zufälliger Gegner im Wirkungsbereich beeinflusst. Außerordentlich mächtige Gegner können gegen Sofortkill-Effekte immun sein. Halten sich in diesem Bereich keine Gegner auf, wirkt sich "Gefahren des Warp" wie gewohnt auf den Aufseher aus.

languages.text: Si le {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g} se trouve dans un rayon de 4 cases autour de la psyber-corneille, chaque fois qu'il déclenche {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}Périls du Warp{/g}, au lieu d'affecter le surveillant, l'effet s'applique à un ennemi aléatoire dans ce même rayon. Les ennemis d'une puissance exceptionnelle peuvent être insensibles aux effets de mort instantanée. S'il n'y a aucun ennemi dans cette zone, l'effet s'applique au surveillant.
languages.original_text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. Exceptionally powerful enemies can be immune to instant-kill effects. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.

traits.locale_text: Si le {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g} se trouve dans un rayon de 4 cases autour de la psyber-corneille, chaque fois qu'il déclenche {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}Périls du Warp{/g}, au lieu d'affecter le surveillant, l'effet s'applique à un ennemi aléatoire dans ce même rayon. Les ennemis d'une puissance exceptionnelle peuvent être insensibles aux effets de mort instantanée. S'il n'y a aucun ennemi dans cette zone, l'effet s'applique au surveillant.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}監督者{/g}がサイバーレイヴンの半径4セル以内にいる場合、監督者が{g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}危険な歪み{/g}を発生させると、監督者の代わりにそのエリア内にいるランダムな敵に影響する。このエリアに敵がいない場合、危険な歪みは通常通り監督者に影響する。
languages.original_text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.

traits.locale_text: 監督者がサイバーレイヴンの半径4セル以内にいる場合、監督者が危険な歪みを発生させると、監督者の代わりにそのエリア内にいるランダムな敵に影響する。このエリアに敵がいない場合、危険な歪みは通常通り監督者に影響する。
監督者がサイバーレイヴンの半径4セル以内にいる場合、監督者が危険な歪みを発生させると、監督者の代わりにそのエリア内にいるランダムな敵に影響する。このエリアに敵がいない場合、危険な歪みは通常通り監督者に影響する。

languages.text: Если {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}надзиратель{/g} в радиусе 4 клеток от псайберворона вызвал {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}угрозы варпа{/g}, они действуют не на надзирателя, а на случайного врага в этой же области. У некоторых особо сильных врагов есть иммунитет к эффектам, которые могут немедленно их убить. Если в этой области врагов нет, то угрозы варпа действуют на надзирателя, как обычно.
languages.original_text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g} is within 4 cells of the psyber-raven, whenever the Overseer triggers {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}perils of the warp{/g}, it affects a random enemy inside that area instead of the Overseer. Exceptionally powerful enemies can be immune to instant-kill effects. If there are no enemies in this area, perils of the warp affects the Overseer as usual.

traits.locale_text: Если {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}надзиратель{/g} в радиусе 4 клеток от псайберворона вызвал {g|Encyclopedia:PerilsOfWarp}угрозы варпа{/g}, они действуют не на надзирателя, а на случайного врага в этой же области. У некоторых особо сильных врагов есть иммунитет к эффектам, которые могут немедленно их убить. Если в этой области врагов нет, то угрозы варпа действуют на надзирателя, как обычно.

Если надзиратель в радиусе 4 клеток от псайберворона вызвал угрозы варпа, они действуют не на надзирателя, а на случайного врага в этой же области. Если в этой области врагов нет, то угрозы варпа действуют на надзирателя, как обычно.
